memoryArtifacts.headline: JOSEPH DAVIS AND SARAH CHAMBERLAIN
memoryArtifacts.description:
JOSEPH DAVIS AND SARAH CHAMBERLAIN 
Joseph Davis, born 12 Oct 1647, Roxbury, Suffolk, Mass. Married 28 Oct 1670, Sarah Chamberlain, at Roxbury, Mass. Died 25 Dec 1717, Roxbury, Suffolk, Mass. ORD: Bap …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Chamberlain於1649年12月18日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親Edmund Chamberlain Sr.33歲，母親Mary Turner24歲。她於1670年10月28日與Joseph Davis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1717年12月25日在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年68歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Chamberlain于1649年12月18日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲Edmund Chamberlain Sr.33岁，母亲Mary Turner24岁。她于1670年10月28日与Joseph Davis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1717年12月25日在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年68岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Chamberlain was born on 18 December 1649, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edmund Chamberlain Sr., was 33 and her mother, Mary Turner, was 24. She married Joseph Davis on 28 October 1670, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 25 December 1717, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 68, and was buried in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Chamberlain est née le 18 décembre 1649, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edmund Chamberlain Sr., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary Turner, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Joseph Davis le 28 octobre 1670, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1717, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Chamberlain am 18. Dezember 1649 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Chamberlain Sr. 33 und ihre Mutter Mary Turner 24. Sie hat am 28. Oktober 1670 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Joseph Davis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1717 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Chamberlain è nata il il 18 dicembre 1649 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edmund Chamberlain Sr., aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mary Turner, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Joseph Davis il 28 ottobre 1670, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1717, nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Chamberlainが1649年12月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Edmund Chamberlain Sr.は33歳，母Mary Turnerは24歳であった。1670年10月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでJoseph Davisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1717年12月25日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンロクスブリーで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンにて埋葬された。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡

ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuse: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 무디 라이버
ko.Pomfret, Windham, Colony of Connecticut,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 폼프렛
ko.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Chamberlain(이)가 1649년 12월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Chamberlain Sr.(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Turner(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1670년 10월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Joseph Davis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1717년 12월 25일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Chamberlain nasceu em 18 de dezembro de 1649, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edmund Chamberlain Sr., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary Turner, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Davis em 28 de outubro de 1670, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1717, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Chamberlain родилась 18 декабря 1649 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edmund Chamberlain Sr. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Turner, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Davis 28 октября 1670 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 25 декабря 1717 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Chamberlain nació el 18 de diciembre de 1649, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edmund Chamberlain Sr., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mary Turner, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joseph Davis el 28 de octubre de 1670, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1717, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
